events.title: Cook Well Berkeley: Spring Vegetables
events.location: Tang Center / Virtual Classroom, Berkeley, CA
events.description: Learn to prepare delicious and nutritious seasonal spring vegetables with demonstrations and samples.

events.title: Staff Garden Volunteer Day
events.location: Staff Garden, North side of Mulford Hall, Berkeley, CA
events.description: UC Berkeley staff, faculty, retirees, and students are welcome to help maintain the campus garden.

events.title: Ergonomics and Wellness in the Office Workshop
events.description: Maximize office performance with the latest ergonomics and wellness protocols for computer use and work cycles.

events.title: Creativity & Your Well-Being: Intro to Watercolor and Mindfulness
events.location: University Health Services - Ed Center, Berkeley, CA
events.description: Discover how creative activities like watercolor can lower stress, boost immunity, and increase productivity.

events.title: AI Ethics in Practice: Navigating Bias in Algorithms
events.description: A deep dive into the ethical implications of AI development and strategies for mitigating algorithmic bias in real-world applications.

events.title: Cal Men's Gymnastics vs. Oklahoma
events.description: The Cal Men's Gymnastics team hosts Oklahoma for their final regular season meet and Senior Day.

events.title: Berkeley Startup Fair 2026
events.description: Connect with UC Berkeley-affiliated startups, explore internship and career opportunities, and network with founders.

events.title: Cal Performances: Kronos Quartet
events.description: The renowned Kronos Quartet performs a program of contemporary and classical works.

events.title: Berkeley Student Association Spring Social
events.location: Pauley Ballroom, MLK Student Union, Berkeley, CA
events.description: An evening of networking and community building for all UC Berkeley students.

events.title: Frontiers in Quantum Computing: New Paradigms
events.description: A seminar exploring the latest breakthroughs and future directions in quantum computing research.

events.title: BAMPFA Film Series: French New Wave Classics
events.organizer: Berkeley Art Museum and Pacific Film Archive (BAMPFA)
events.location: BAMPFA Barbro Osher Theater, Berkeley, CA
events.description: A screening of iconic films from the French New Wave cinematic movement, with an introduction by a film scholar.

events.title: Beyond the Idea: Legal Basics for Startups
events.organizer: Berkeley Law - Berkeley Center for Law and Business
events.description: A workshop covering essential legal considerations for early-stage startups, from incorporation to intellectual property.

events.title: Public Policy for a Changing Climate
events.description: A lunchtime lecture series discussing effective policy strategies to address climate change at local and global levels.

events.title: Graduate Student Happy Hour
events.description: A casual social event for graduate students to connect and unwind.

events.title: Cal Baseball vs. Stanford
events.description: The Golden Bears face off against rival Stanford in a crucial Pac-12 baseball matchup.

events.title: Legal Tech & the Future of Justice
events.description: Experts from Berkeley Law discuss how technology is transforming legal practice and access to justice.

events.title: Cal Softball vs. UCLA
events.description: Cal Softball hosts UCLA for a Sunday afternoon conference game.

events.title: Pitch Deck Workshop for Early-Stage Ventures
events.location: Chou Hall, Haas School of Business, Berkeley, CA
events.description: Learn how to craft a compelling pitch deck to attract investors, with feedback from experienced mentors.

events.title: Campus Housing Spring Fest
events.description: A campus-wide festival celebrating spring with games, food trucks, and live music for students.

events.title: Chemistry Department Colloquium: Novel Catalytic Systems
events.location: Pitzer Auditorium, Latimer Hall, Berkeley, CA
events.description: Weekly colloquium featuring research on advanced catalytic systems and their applications.

events.title: Data Science Applications in Public Health
events.description: A seminar on leveraging data science methodologies to address critical public health challenges.

events.title: Intramural Basketball Playoffs - Championship Game
events.description: The culmination of the intramural basketball season, with teams vying for the campus championship.

events.title: Berkeley Symphony Orchestra: Spring Concert
events.description: The Berkeley Symphony performs a selection of orchestral masterworks for their annual spring concert.

events.title: Cal Women's Tennis vs. USC
events.description: The Cal Women's Tennis team takes on USC in a high-stakes conference match.

events.title: Social Impact Startup Challenge Info Session
events.description: Information session for students interested in participating in the annual Social Impact Startup Challenge.

events.title: Energy Institute Seminar Series: Sustainable Energy Grids
events.location: Haas School of Business, Berkeley, CA
events.description: Weekly seminar exploring innovations and policies for sustainable energy infrastructure.

events.title: Student Dance Showcase
events.organizer: Department of Theater, Dance, and Performance Studies
events.description: An evening featuring diverse dance performances choreographed and performed by UC Berkeley students.

events.title: Robotics and AI in Smart Cities
events.description: A lecture on the integration of robotics and artificial intelligence to create more efficient and livable urban environments.

events.title: Cal Men's Lacrosse vs. UC Davis
events.description: Cal's Men's Club Lacrosse team competes against UC Davis in a home game.

events.title: Botanical Garden Spring Photography Workshop
events.description: A guided workshop on capturing the beauty of spring flora, open to photographers of all skill levels.

events.title: Cal Greek Life Spring Mixer
events.description: An inter-council social event for members of UC Berkeley's Greek organizations.

events.title: BIDS Data Science Fellowship Presentation
events.description: Presentations by current BIDS fellows on their interdisciplinary data science research projects.

events.title: Innovate Berkeley: From Research to Market
events.description: A seminar for researchers and students on commercializing university-developed technologies and intellectual property.

events.title: Climate Change Law & Policy Symposium
events.description: An all-day symposium examining the evolving legal and policy frameworks for climate change mitigation and adaptation.

events.title: UC Berkeley Jazz Ensemble Concert
events.description: An evening of jazz standards and original compositions performed by the talented UC Berkeley Jazz Ensemble.

events.title: Berkeley Half Marathon - Student Volunteer Registration
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Campus Recreation / City of Berkeley
events.description: Opportunity for students to volunteer at the annual Berkeley Half Marathon, supporting a major community event.

events.title: Cleantech Entrepreneurship Showcase
events.organizer: Haas Energy Institute / Berkeley Cleantech Network
events.location: Haas School of Business, Berkeley, CA
events.description: Featuring promising cleantech startups and innovations from the Berkeley ecosystem, followed by networking.

events.title: Cybersecurity and Privacy in the Age of AI
events.location: Banatao Auditorium, Sutardja Dai Hall, Berkeley, CA
events.description: A panel discussion on the intersection of artificial intelligence, cybersecurity threats, and privacy concerns.

events.title: Neuroscience of Decision Making Lecture
events.location: Li Ka Shing Center, Berkeley, CA
events.description: Distinguished speaker discussing the neural mechanisms underlying human decision-making processes.

events.title: BAMPFA Art History Lecture: Modern Art Movements
events.organizer: Berkeley Art Museum and Pacific Film Archive (BAMPFA)
events.location: BAMPFA Barbro Osher Theater, Berkeley, CA
events.description: A lecture delving into the key artists and philosophical underpinnings of major modern art movements.

events.title: Inclusive Design for Digital Products Workshop
events.description: An interactive workshop on principles and practices for designing accessible and inclusive digital experiences.

events.title: Cal Track & Field: Brutus Hamilton Invitational
events.description: UC Berkeley hosts its annual track and field invitational, featuring collegiate athletes from across the region.

events.title: Cal Performances: Guest Author Reading & Q&A
events.description: A celebrated contemporary author reads from their latest work, followed by a moderated discussion and audience Q&A.

events.title: Women in Entrepreneurship Panel Discussion
events.location: Chou Hall, Haas School of Business, Berkeley, CA
events.description: A panel of successful female founders and leaders share their experiences and advice in the startup world.

events.title: Future of Work: Technology, Society, and Policy
events.organizer: Richard and Rhoda Goldman School of Public Policy
events.description: A panel discussion on how technological advancements are reshaping the nature of work and its societal impact.

events.title: UC Berkeley Opera Workshop Scenes
events.description: Students from the Opera Workshop perform scenes from various operas, showcasing their vocal and dramatic talents.

events.title: Intramural Soccer Tournament - Finals
events.location: Memorial Stadium Practice Field, Berkeley, CA
events.description: Championship games for the spring intramural soccer league.

events.title: End-of-Semester Study Break & Pizza
events.location: Golden Bear Cafe Patio, Berkeley, CA
events.description: A free pizza event for students to relax and de-stress before final exams.

events.title: Product-Market Fit Workshop
events.organizer: Fung Institute for Engineering Leadership (College of Engineering)
events.description: An intensive workshop designed to help early-stage founders validate their product ideas and achieve product-market fit.

events.title: Bioengineering Seminar: Advances in Gene Editing
events.description: Weekly seminar highlighting cutting-edge research in gene editing technologies and their therapeutic potential.

events.title: BAMPFA Film Series: Japanese Animation Retrospective
events.organizer: Berkeley Art Museum and Pacific Film Archive (BAMPFA)
events.location: BAMPFA Barbro Osher Theater, Berkeley, CA
events.description: A curated film series exploring the history and artistry of Japanese animated cinema.

events.title: Cal Rugby vs. Saint Mary's
events.description: The Cal Bears Rugby team in a highly anticipated match against Saint Mary's.

events.title: Investor Networking Reception: Berkeley Founders
events.description: An exclusive networking event connecting Berkeley founders with angel investors and venture capitalists.

events.title: Mindful Eating and Mental Health Workshop
events.description: Explore the relationship between food, eating, and mental health using Intuitive Eating and Mindful Eating principles.

events.title: UC Berkeley Library Speaker Series: Archival Research in the Digital Age
events.description: A talk on new methodologies and challenges in conducting archival research with digital tools and resources.

events.title: CITRIS Research Exchange: Smart Sensing for Environmental Monitoring
events.location: Banatao Auditorium, Sutardja Dai Hall, Berkeley, CA
events.description: A presentation on the development and application of smart sensor technologies for critical environmental data collection.

events.title: Summer Startup Accelerator Kick-off
events.organizer: Berkeley SCET (Sutardja Center for Entrepreneurship & Technology)
events.description: The official launch of SCET's summer accelerator program, featuring introductions to the cohort and mentors.

events.title: Berkeley AI Summit 2026 - Keynote Address
events.organizer: Berkeley Artificial Intelligence Research (BAIR) Lab / College of Engineering
events.description: Opening keynote address for the annual Berkeley AI Summit, featuring a leading figure in artificial intelligence research.

events.title: Graduate Division Workshop: Dissertation Writing Strategies
events.description: A workshop for graduate students focusing on effective strategies for organizing and completing their dissertations.

events.title: Research Data Summit: Best Practices in Data Management
events.description: An all-day summit on current best practices and tools for managing research data across disciplines.

events.title: Dinosaur Discovery Day
events.location: Lawrence Hall of Science, Berkeley, CA
events.description: A family-friendly event featuring interactive exhibits and activities focused on dinosaurs and paleontology.

events.title: Simons Institute Seminar: Mathematics in Quantum Physics
events.organizer: Simons Institute for the Theory of Computing
events.description: A specialized seminar exploring the intricate mathematical foundations of modern quantum physics.

events.title: Space Sciences Lab Public Lecture: Exoplanet Discoveries
events.description: A public lecture on the latest exciting discoveries in exoplanet research and the search for extraterrestrial life.

events.title: ITS Berkeley Colloquium: Future of Urban Transportation
events.location: Richmond Field Station (ITS Building), Berkeley, CA
events.description: A colloquium discussing emerging technologies and policy challenges in urban transportation planning and innovation.

events.title: CDSS Seminar: Machine Learning in Precision Health
events.organizer: College of Computing, Data Science, and Society (CDSS)
events.location: Connie & Kevin Chou Hall, Berkeley, CA
events.description: A seminar focusing on the application of machine learning techniques to advance precision health and personalized medicine.

events.title: Berkeley BioTech Forum: Innovations in Drug Discovery
events.description: An interdisciplinary forum showcasing new research and startup innovations in biotechnology and drug discovery.

events.title: CITRIS Policy Lab Discussion: Bridging the Digital Divide
events.description: A policy-focused discussion on challenges and solutions for ensuring equitable access to technology and digital literacy.

events.title: Berkeley Seed Fund Pitch Day
events.location: Haas School of Business, Berkeley, CA
events.description: Startups from the Berkeley community pitch to a panel of investors for seed funding opportunities.

events.title: BAMPFA Family Art Workshop: Sculpture Exploration
events.organizer: Berkeley Art Museum and Pacific Film Archive (BAMPFA)
events.description: A hands-on workshop for families to explore different sculptural techniques and create their own art.

events.title: Ethnomusicology Guest Lecture: Music of the Pacific Rim
events.description: A guest lecturer discusses the diverse musical traditions and cultural significance of music from the Pacific Rim region.

events.title: Spring Flora Guided Walk at Botanical Garden
events.description: A guided tour highlighting the seasonal blooms and unique plant collections of the botanical garden in spring.

events.title: Cal Performances: An Evening with a Stand-up Comedian
events.description: A performance by a nationally recognized stand-up comedian, offering an evening of humor and entertainment.

events.description: The Cal Women's Basketball team hosts a conference opponent in a critical late-season matchup.

events.title: Cal Men's Basketball vs. [Opponent TBD]
events.description: The Cal Men's Basketball team plays a home game against a conference rival.

events.title: Cal Baseball vs. Oregon State
events.description: The Golden Bears continue their Pac-12 baseball season at home against Oregon State.

events.title: Cal Softball vs. Arizona
events.description: Cal Softball hosts Arizona for a mid-week conference game.

events.title: Cal Men's Soccer Spring Exhibition
events.description: The Cal Men's Soccer team plays a spring exhibition match.

events.title: Lawrence Hall of Science: Rocketry Workshop
events.location: Lawrence Hall of Science, Berkeley, CA
events.description: A hands-on workshop for aspiring engineers to design, build, and launch their own model rockets.

events.title: ASUC Student Government Town Hall
events.organizer: Associated Students of the University of California (ASUC)
events.location: Pauley Ballroom, MLK Student Union, Berkeley, CA
events.description: An open forum for students to engage with their student government representatives and voice concerns.

events.title: Career Center Workshop: Resume & Cover Letter Review
events.description: Drop-in workshop offering personalized feedback on resumes and cover letters for job and internship applications.

events.title: Student Organization Leadership Conference
events.location: Anna Head Alumnae Hall, Berkeley, CA
events.description: An annual conference designed to develop leadership skills for students involved in campus organizations.

events.title: Weekend Startup Bootcamp: Idea to MVP

events.location: Fung Institute, Sutardja Dai Hall, Berkeley, CA
events.description: An intensive weekend bootcamp guiding aspiring entrepreneurs through developing their startup ideas into a Minimum Viable Product.
